generated_oml:
instance PhotometricSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors modeled within BIM environments for photometric values"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhotometricDataTransmitted
]

instance PhotometricDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhotometricSensor
]

instance PhotometricData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Photometric values data from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, EclipseHono
]

instance LightTwinComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting systems controlled via Eclipse Ditto"
]

instance HVACTwinComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for HVAC systems controlled via Eclipse Ditto"
]

instance LightFeatureParser : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Feature parser for photometric values"
]

instance DittoDevice : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Device addressing entity for Eclipse Ditto"
]

instance DittoConnection : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Connection entity for Eclipse Ditto"
]

instance RevitBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Revit-based BIM models enriched with device metadata for sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEFramework
]

instance DTModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured DT artifacts generated from BIM models via MDE"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance MDEFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework for transforming BIM models into structured DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalytics, ControlCapabilities
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message delivery for real-time data synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Policy-based validation and persistent storage for sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, ControlCapabilities
]

instance VisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization interface for system oversight"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualization
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring through continuous data synchronization with physical infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization for immersive system oversight"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for operational forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance ControlCapabilities : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control capabilities for managing physical assets"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insights for system oversight"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization insights for system oversight"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics insights for operational forecasting"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control actions for managing physical assets"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AECOBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building within AECO domain as the physical system under study"
    base:contains PhotometricSensor, LightTwinComponent, HVACTwinComponent, LightFeatureParser, DittoDevice, DittoConnection
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for component integration, central hub orchestration of roles (Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, DT Engineers) for bidirectional data exchange and holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)-based extraction of structured representations and automatic generation of deployable artifacts, real-time data synchronization between physical and digital systems, Facility Manager-driven monitoring and control operations, and evolution through modular integration of custom services by DT Engineers."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity and validity are maintained through Eclipse Ditto's policy-based validation for sensor data and actuator command pre-execution checks, ensuring compliance with value ranges and units. Fault tolerance is provided by Eclipse Hono's at-least-once message delivery and Ditto's persistent event storage, preventing data loss during network failures and maintaining synchronization."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems is supported through standardized extension points for custom services and analytics, leveraging BIM models as the foundational data source; specific data exchange protocols, interoperability standards, dependencies on external systems, or integration patterns with other Digital Twins are not detailed in the documents."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with BIM standards for device modeling and a unified semantic foundation for data schemas ensures interoperability, while standardized extension points support integration of custom services, addressing fragmented data schemas and enhancing system scalability."
]
